display.purpose: Hero + closing headlines, uppercase, tight tracking.

body.purpose: Paragraphs and feature copy, neutral grotesque, never rounded.

label.purpose: Lime kicker labels, ≤4 words, wide tracking.

mono.purpose: Every datapoint: kilos, %, PRs, streaks, prices.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Under device mockups so the app floats off the page.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state of an interactive card, paired with translateY(-4px) + lime-tinted border.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Breathing lime halo behind the hero mockup (not a drop shadow).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease for state transitions and reveals (150-250ms).

motion.name: glow-pulse
motion.purpose: Hero lime glow, slow breathing. Replaces the killed idle float.

motion.name: sweep
motion.value: 650ms diagonal shine across CTA on hover
motion.purpose: Single shine on the primary button hover.

motion.name: draw
motion.purpose: Chart line draws in when its section reveals.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: On-scroll reveal; enhances an already-visible default (no content gated on JS).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The lime CTA. Verb-first label, graphite text on lime, soft-square corners, shine on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Saira Condensed', sans-serif); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; color: #0E1110; background: var(--color-accent, #B4FF2E); border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-btn, 10px); padding: 14px 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-accent-deep, #93D414); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #B4FF2E); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Waitlist email field on graphite; border shifts to lime on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-email { font-family: var(--font-sans, 'Inter', sans-serif); font-size: 1rem; color: #F2F4F1; background: var(--color-surface-2, #1D2224); border: 1px solid var(--color-line, #2A3033); border-radius: var(--radius-btn, 10px); padding: 14px 20px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-input-email::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted, #9BA39E); } .ds-input-email:focus { border-color: var(--color-accent, #B4FF2E); }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Surface card with a single hairline; flat at rest, lifts with a real shadow + lime-tinted border on hover.
components.html:
SERIES, PESOS Y PRS

Apuntas el peso de cada semana y ves si subes o te estancas.

1.000+ ejercicios
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface, #15191A); border: 1px solid var(--color-line, #2A3033); border-radius: var(--radius-card, 14px); padding: 20px; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), border-color 220ms, box-shadow 220ms; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, #B4FF2E 45%, #2A3033); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.55); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Saira Condensed', sans-serif); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-weight: 600; color: #F2F4F1; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: var(--font-sans, 'Inter', sans-serif); color: #9BA39E; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-metric { font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; color: #B4FF2E; }

components.name: Sticky Header
components.description: Translucent graphite header with blur and a bottom hairline; minimal links, lime CTA.
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 0 24px; height: 72px; background: rgba(14,17,16,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-line, #2A3033); } .ds-logo { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Saira Condensed', sans-serif); text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; color: #F2F4F1; } .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 28px; } .ds-nav a { font-family: var(--font-sans, 'Inter', sans-serif); color: #F2F4F1; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: var(--color-accent, #B4FF2E); } .ds-nav-cta { font-family: var(--font-display, 'Saira Condensed', sans-serif); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-weight: 700; color: #0E1110; background: var(--color-accent, #B4FF2E); border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-btn, 10px); padding: 8px 18px; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Data Strip
components.description: Honest proof points in mono separated by hairlines; numbers in lime. No invented logos or fake counters.
components.html: 1.000+ ejercicios1RM fórmulas realesiOS + Apple Watch
components.css: .ds-datastrip { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; color: #9BA39E; } .ds-datastrip span { padding: 8px 20px; border-left: 1px solid var(--color-line, #2A3033); } .ds-datastrip span:first-child { border-left: none; } .ds-datastrip b { color: var(--color-accent, #B4FF2E); font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: A pre-dawn weight room: matte graphite, dropped barbells, one strip of electric light. Disciplined near-black surfaces (#0E1110, never pure black) carry weight and seriousness, punctuated by a single charge of electric lime (#B4FF2E) that fires only where progress is being made. Graphite is the eight-years-of-training discipline; lime is the spark of seeing you actually moved the bar. Typography is built like equipment: condensed uppercase Saira stacks like loaded plates, Inter handles neutral body, JetBrains Mono renders every datapoint as evidence. Surfaces have real depth: graphite gradient, film grain, genuine shadows, lime glow. It rejects generic SaaS chrome, the soft Foodnoms-light app it came from, loud supplement bro-marketing, and the cold corporate dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Graphite-dark canvas with a single electric-lime accent used as a razor (≤10% of any screen).
Condensed uppercase display (Saira) + neutral grotesque body (Inter) + mono for all data (JetBrains Mono).
Real depth: graphite gradient, film grain, genuine shadows, lime glow — never flat-shadowless.
Hierarchised radii (14 / 10 / 999 / 38px), not one friendly universal radius.
Numbers are the hero — data set as evidence, in mono, often in lime.

rules.name: The Razor Rule
rules.body: Electric lime covers ≤10% of any surface: one headline word, the CTA, live metrics, one chart line, the focus ring. Paint a whole block lime and it reads as a supermarket protein bag.

rules.name: The Two-Greens Rule
rules.body: Lime means action/progress; Sky means done/logged. They never swap, and lime is never used to mean completed.

rules.name: The No-Pillow Rule
rules.body: Display type is condensed and uppercase. Rounded, friendly faces (Nunito and family) are forbidden — a rounded headline on a fitness brand is wearing slippers to the gym.

rules.name: The Numbers-Are-Mono Rule
rules.body: Any datapoint a user reads as proof (weight, %, max, streak, count, price) is set in JetBrains Mono, never body. Mono makes a number feel measured.

rules.name: The Earned-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are heavy and intentional under mockups and on hover, not sprinkled on every card at rest. Separate blocks by hairline and tone first, shadow second.

rules.name: The Never-Flat Rule
rules.body: The canvas is always a graphite gradient with grain, never a uniform fill. A section that looks like a flat swatch is unfinished.

dos: Do keep the canvas graphite (#0E1110) with the radial gradient + grain. Never a flat fill, never pure black.
Do ration electric lime to ≤10% of any screen (the Razor Rule).
Do set every datapoint in JetBrains Mono, frequently in lime — numbers are the proof.
Do set headlines in Saira Condensed uppercase with tight tracking; pair with Inter body and nothing rounder.
Do put graphite text (#0E1110) on any lime fill, and amber (#F59E0B) on errors.
Do use real shadows under mockups and .lift on hover; separate blocks with 1px #2A3033 hairlines.
Do write CTAs as verbs ('Quiero probarlo', 'Dame acceso'); keep waitlist/acceso anticipado out of the button and in the subtext.
donts: Don't ship the soft consumer-app (Foodnoms-light) look: no white backgrounds, no rounded display type, no universal 26px radius, no flat-shadowless surfaces.
Don't drift into generic SaaS/tech-startup chrome: no hero-metric template, no eyebrow above every section, no corporate voice, no Pricing teaser before a free-email CTA.
Don't go loud supplement bro-marketing: no screaming neon, no hype, no poster clichés ('transforma tu vida', 'siguiente nivel', 'potenciar').
Don't become a cold corporate dashboard: no soulless gray-on-gray KPI tables.
Don't paint whole blocks lime, use a pill on the primary CTA, put light text on a lime fill, color an error lime, or fabricate a social-proof number.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as an accent, gradient-clipped text, or decorative glassmorphism.
